name: @qvac/diffusion-cpp
description: stable-diffusion.cpp addon for qvac image/video generation

scripts.build: bare-make generate && bare-make build && bare-make install
scripts.build:vulkan: bare-make generate && bare-make build && bare-make install
scripts.build:cuda: bare-make generate -D SD_CUDA=ON && bare-make build && bare-make install
scripts.mobile:copy-prebuilds: cp -r prebuilds/android-arm64 prebuilds/android-ia32 || echo 'Warning: Failed to copy sd prebuilds to android-ia32'; cp -r prebuilds/android-arm64 prebuilds/android-arm || echo 'Warning: Failed to copy sd prebuilds to android-arm'; cp -r prebuilds/android-arm64 prebuilds/android-x64 || echo 'Warning: Failed to copy sd prebuilds to android-x64'; cp -r prebuilds/ios-arm64 prebuilds/ios-arm64-simulator 2>/dev/null || echo 'iOS prebuilds already present'; cp -r prebuilds/ios-arm64 prebuilds/ios-x64-simulator 2>/dev/null || echo 'iOS prebuilds already present'
scripts.test:integration:generate: brittle -r test/integration/all.js test/integration/*.test.js && npm run test:mobile:generate
scripts.test:cpp:build: bare-make generate -D BUILD_TESTING=ON && bare-make build --target addon-test
scripts.test:cpp: npm run test:cpp:build && npm run test:cpp:run
scripts.coverage:cpp:build: bare-make generate -D BUILD_TESTING=ON -D ENABLE_COVERAGE=ON && bare-make build --target addon-test
scripts.coverage:cpp:report: cd build/test/unit/ && ls -lha && llvm-profdata-19 merge -sparse default.profraw -o coverage.profdata && llvm-cov-19 show ./addon-test -instr-profile=coverage.profdata -format=html -output-dir=coverage-html -ignore-filename-regex='(tests|build|node_modules|gtest|gmock|\.vcpkg|/usr)/' && llvm-cov-19 export ./addon-test -instr-profile=coverage.profdata -format=lcov -ignore-filename-regex='(tests|build|node_modules|gtest|gmock|\.vcpkg|/usr)/' > lcov.info && npm run coverage:cpp:summary
scripts.coverage:cpp: npm run coverage:cpp:build && npm run coverage:cpp:run && npm run coverage:cpp:report
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:cpp

author: Tether
